rationale: Review 1's sole finding misreads the targeted `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` (which restricts the simp set exactly as desired for proof quality) as an untargeted simp, so acting on the suggested rewrite to `simp only` (or an Iff.intro) is needless and risks introducing a non-compiling change. Review 2 correctly approves the clean, direct proofs matching the rubric, yielding the better merged PR.
